3049485.title: Avatar
3049485.description: When a young waterbender, named Katara, and her brother, Sokka, discover a giant iceberg while fishing for food around their homestead at the South Pole, they discover that there is a boy, named Aang, inside.

3068187.title: Avatar
3068187.description: After Aang accidentally sets off a Fire Nation trap, he is banished from the South Pole. Soon after Prince Zuko attacks the Southern Water Tribe seeking to capture the Avatar. Aang returns and surrenders to save the Water Tribe.

3068280.title: Avatar
3068280.description: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

3025501.title: Avatar
3025501.description: As one of Aang's little detours, the group heads toward the island of Kyoshi. But soon they learn that the townspeople don't trust foreigners at all; however, when Aang proves to them that he is the Avatar they are treated as guests of honor.

3025840.title: Avatar
3025840.description: Aang takes Katara and Sokka back to a favorite place he used to go to when he was younger, the Earth Kingdom City of Omashu. But when they break the law they are taken to the King to get their punishment.

3048039.title: Avatar
3048039.description: While traveling towards the North Pole, the group almost gets captured by the Fire Nation.

3048132.title: Avatar
3048132.description: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across.

3066837.title: Avatar
3066837.description: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

3067644.title: Avatar
3067644.description: After Sokka and Katara get sick due to being in the storm, Aang seeks out a cure and discovers he needs some frozen frogs in order to get them cured.

3085304.title: Avatar
3085304.description: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

3085386.title: Avatar
3085386.description: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.
